title: HardCraft
description: If you downolad them , then good luck :)
body:
# **Hello!(Short description)**
My mod makes Minecraft a really hard game with interesting mechanics and unique items. The mod is frequently updated, but updates are not large and have a special style.![Mod icon in minecraft:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f720c86400510fb6cd504646f02db447cab2961_0.webp)
# **Mechanics:**
As of version 1.0.5, the mod includes more than 12 mechanics.
1. **Difficulty**(when a world is created, all players receive a Nightmare Star. Using it increases the difficulty by 1. Initially, it’s "Nightmare," and after that, you get a Bloody World Star, which further increases the difficulty.)
2. **MobSpawning**(when a mob spawns, it can receive effects such as strength, regeneration, resistance, or speed. The amplifier, chance, and level depend on the difficulty.)
3. **PlayerDeath**(when a player dies, there is a 20 × difficulty chance that a creeper will spawn at their death location. If the difficulty is "Bloody World," a charged creeper always spawns.)
4. **PoisonedFood**(all meat now has a small chance to poison the player and a higher chance to cause hunger.)
5. **PlayerTakesDamage**(when a player takes damage, they can receive the blindness effect and take an additional point of damage. If the attacker is a skeleton or wither skeleton, a small explosion occurs.)
6. **PlayerHasSmallHp**(if a player has less than 10 HP, they receive weakness and slowness (amplifier 1). If their HP drops below 4, the amplifier matches the difficulty level.)
7. **MobVariants**(when a skeleton or spider spawns, it can appear as an alternate version, such as a wither skeleton or a cave spider.)
8. **MobGeneration**(when an undead mob spawns, it may create a clone of itself.)
9. **Bosses**(when a zombie spawns, it has a chance to become a boss, gaining speed, strength, resistance, and regeneration. Upon death, it drops great loot such as iron, diamonds, or gold.)
10. **PlayerSleep**(when a player wakes up, they restore 9 to 12 HP but also receive blindness and hunger effects)
11. **Bandages**(first deal a small amount of damage, then heal the player for 9 to 12 HP.)
12. **ArmorPLates**(grant effects such as speed, strength, resistance, or regeneration, depending on the level.)

# **Items**
## **Types:**
- Armor plates(provide the player with different effects.)
- Bandages(heal the player.)
- booty(cosmetic items that you can show off to your friends.)
- Big swords(has giant size,big damage,hard to craft)
